name: NavMesh
description: A sophisticated navigation mesh system that generates walkable surfaces from scene geometry and provides pathfinding services for AI agents. Uses Recast/Detour algorithm via navcat library to create optimized navigation meshes with configurable agent parameters, obstacle detection, and debug visualization. Singleton behavior that automatically regenerates on scene changes. KEY FEATURES:
documentation:
## NavMesh
Generate navigation meshes for AI pathfinding.

### Cell Settings
- **Cell Size** - Horizontal precision (smaller = more detail)
- **Cell Height** - Vertical precision (should be < Max Climb)

### Agent Settings
- **Agent Height/Radius** - Size of navigation agents
- **Max Climb Height** - Step height agents can traverse
- **Max Slope** - Maximum walkable slope angle

### Quality Settings
- **Region Min/Merge Size** - Control mesh simplification
- **Edge Max Length/Error** - Polygon edge parameters
- **Vertices Per Polygon** - Max vertices (3-6)

### Behavior
- **Auto Generate** - Build NavMesh automatically on load
- **Only Physics Meshes** - Limit to objects with physics
- **Show Debug Mesh** - Visualize the NavMesh wireframe

### Tips
- Only one NavMesh per scene (singleton)
- Used by Enemy, NPC, and AI NPC for pathfinding
- Lower cell size = better quality but slower generation
- Enable debug mesh to verify walkable areas
author: stemstudio

enabled.name: Enable NavMesh
enabled.description: Enable or disable the navigation mesh system

cellLabel.name: Cell Settings
cellLabel.description: Controls the resolution of the navigation mesh

cellSize.name: Cell Size
cellSize.description: Size of cells in horizontal plane. Smaller values = higher precision but slower generation

cellHeight.name: Cell Height
cellHeight.description: Height of cells. Should be smaller than agentMaxClimb

agentLabel.name: Agent Settings
agentLabel.description: Configure the size and capabilities of navigation agents

agentHeight.name: Agent Height
agentHeight.description: Height of navigation agents (NPCs, enemies, etc.)

agentRadius.name: Agent Radius
agentRadius.description: Radius of navigation agents. Affects how close agents can get to walls

agentMaxClimb.name: Max Climb Height
agentMaxClimb.description: Maximum height agents can climb (steps, curbs, etc.)

agentMaxSlope.name: Max Slope (degrees)
agentMaxSlope.description: Maximum slope angle agents can walk on

regionMinSize.name: Region Min Size
regionMinSize.description: Minimum size of walkable regions. Smaller regions will be removed

regionMergeSize.name: Region Merge Size
regionMergeSize.description: Regions smaller than this will be merged with larger ones

edgeMaxLen.name: Edge Max Length
edgeMaxLen.description: Maximum length of polygon edges. Lower values = more detailed mesh

edgeMaxError.name: Edge Max Error
edgeMaxError.description: Maximum error allowed when simplifying edges

vertsPerPoly.name: Vertices Per Polygon
vertsPerPoly.description: Maximum number of vertices per polygon

detailLabel.name: Detail Settings
detailLabel.description: Controls detail mesh generation for precise navigation

detailSampleDist.name: Detail Sample Distance
detailSampleDist.description: Distance between detail mesh samples. 0 = disabled

onlyPhysicsMeshes.name: Only Physics Meshes
onlyPhysicsMeshes.description: Only include meshes with physics bodies in navmesh generation

debugVisualization.name: Show Debug Mesh
debugVisualization.description: Show NavMesh wireframe for debugging and visualization
